$schema.title: Project Config Schema URL
$schema.description: The Schema URL, which should be `https://weme-ui.github.io/schema/v3/config.schema.json`

components.title: Components Path
components.description: The path of the components directory.

composables.title: Composables Path
composables.description: The path of the composables directory.

layouts.title: Layouts Path
layouts.description: The path of the layouts directory.

plugins.title: Plugins Path
plugins.description: The path of the plugins directory.

themes.title: Themes Path
themes.description: The path of the themes directory.

pages.title: Pages Path
pages.description: The path of the pages directory.

types.title: Types Path
types.description: The path of the types directory.

utils.title: Utils Path
utils.description: The path of the utils directory.

paths.title: Project Paths
paths.description: The paths used in the project.

registries.title: Project Registries
registries.description: The registries used in the project.

name.title: Registry Name
name.description: The name of the registry, in the format of `owner/repo`.

url.title: Registry URL
url.description: The URL of the registry's `registry.json` file.

default.title: Default Registry
default.description: Whether to use this registry as the default one.

items.title: Project Registry
items.description: A registry used in the project.

cssVariables.title: CSS Variables
cssVariables.description: The CSS variables, which will be merged into the `uno.config.ts` file.

title: Weme UI Project Config JSON Schema Definitions (v3)
description: This schema defines the structure of the project JSON file used in Weme UI.
